allow: Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL ok'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import struct, zlib; print\('can write PNG manually'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow ready'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: d = json.loads\(line\) msg = d.get\('message', {}\) for block in msg.get\('content', []\): if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'image': src = block.get\('source', {}\) if src.get\('type'\) == 'base64': print\('Found base64 image, media_type:', src.get\('media_type'\), 'length:', len\(src.get\('data',''\)\)\) elif src.get\('type'\) == 'url': print\('Found url image:', src.get\('url',''\)[:80]\) elif src.get\('type'\) == 'file': print\('Found file image:', src.get\('file_id',''\)\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: d = json.loads\(line\) msg = d.get\('message', {}\) content = msg.get\('content', []\) for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\): t = block.get\('type',''\) if t == 'image': src = block.get\('source', {}\) print\('image block, source type:', src.get\('type'\)\) if src.get\('type'\) == 'base64': data = src.get\('data',''\) import base64 raw = base64.b64decode\(data\) with open\('/tmp/user_screenshot.png', 'wb'\) as f: f.write\(raw\) print\('Saved to /tmp/user_screenshot.png, size:', len\(raw\)\) elif t not in \('text', 'tool_use', 'tool_result'\): print\('other block type:', t\) except Exception as e: print\('err:', e\) ")
